name: Smol Kobold Garden
short_description: Collect, breed, and train small creatures known as kobolds. Expand your garden and compete in a variety of mini-games in a cozy creature raising game.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Smol Kobold Garden

Smol Kobold Garden is a cozy yet deep creature raising game where you collect, breed, and train adorable little kobolds!

An Ever Changing Garden

Shape your dream garden by changing the terrain and ecosystem to attract new creatures and uncover hidden species.

Features

  • Raise and Breed unique kobolds with different colors, shapes, patterns and personality traits.
  • Good or Evil? The way you care influences your kobolds attitude and how they grow over time!
  • Mini-games and Competitions. Earn items, medals, and upgrades in a variety of smaller games.

Will you create the ultimate life form? Start your garden today!
